# SearchPrex
 
> Founder-led SEO agency helping local, ecommerce, technical, and law firm
> businesses recover and grow organic search visibility. Every result is
> backed by verified Google Search Console data — no vanity metrics.
 
SearchPrex is run directly by its founder, Mubashar Shahzad, a 5+ year SEO
analyst. Clients work with the person who built the strategy, not a rotating
team of juniors. The agency also builds NicheSEOPro AI, a companion SEO
SaaS tool.
 
## Services
 
- [Local SEO](https://www.searchprex.com/services/local-seo): Google Business
  Profile optimization, citation building, and map pack ranking for local
  and multi-location service businesses.
- [Ecommerce SEO](https://www.searchprex.com/services/ecommerce-seo): Technical
  audits, faceted navigation fixes, indexing recovery, and content strategy
  for large product catalogs.
- [Technical SEO](https://www.searchprex.com/services/technical-seo): Site
  migrations, indexing recovery, Core Web Vitals, and crawl budget
  optimization.
- [Law Firm SEO](https://www.searchprex.com/services/law-firm-seo): Local
  authority building, E-E-A-T content, and lead-focused SEO for law firms.
 
## Case Studies
 
- [All Case Studies](https://www.searchprex.com/all-case-studies): Verified,
  Google Search Console-backed results across ecommerce, local, technical,
  and law firm SEO clients, filterable by industry and SEO type.
 
## Tools
 
- [NicheSEOPro AI](https://nicheseopro.com): AI-powered SEO content and
  keyword research tool, built by the SearchPrex team.
- [Free SEO Audit](https://www.searchprex.com/free-audit): Founder-reviewed
  audit request, delivered within 24-48 hours.
